transcript: The episode opens with Sarah arguing over the phone, a door then opens to the apartment and she drops her phone and says sorry. The next morning her body is found in landfill, Henry then analyzes her vintage cloth and a photo found on her and figures out Sarah was dressing as a late 70s woman for someone's pleasure. Henry and Joe then talk to her roommate Jennifer and she informs them that Sarah has changed in the last few months and she also has dropped all of her classes except sex psychology. Henry and Joe then go to NYU and they find the dominatrix therapist Tiona teaching the class. She tells them Sarah came to her for advice about a role-playing relationship. Meanwhile, Lucas and Mike go back to the landfill and they find Mayo which had her blood. Henry and Joe then go visit the home and are surprised to find everything in the home resembles the late 70s. They then find another picture that looks like Sarah's with the only difference being that picture was actually taken in the 1970s. The next day they meet with Iona. They play Sarah's audition tape to role play in 1970 as housewife and Iona figures out the man trying to recreate a memory from that time. The team searches for the person that rented the home in 1979 and they come up with Neville. Henry and Joe then go to his office but Neville tells them he doesn't know Sarah. Henry then takes out the old picture and starts destroying it. This forces Neville admit that the woman in the picture was his wife who died in 1981. Then when Joe asks him if he was with Sarah, he confesses to killing her. In the interrogation room he reveals to them that he hired Sarah because she looked so much as his wife. he wanted to recreate the night she told him she was pregnant, but when he came that night Sarah was holding her phone, which he didn't allow, he then tells them he got angry and shows them how he stabbed Sarah. Henry is watching the confession from the outside and the way Neville told him stabbed Sarah was not the right way. He later meets up with Iona and they go back to the apartment to recreate the fantasy. The two kiss as they roleplay the night and Henry notices an alcohol stain on the couch. He then takes a sample which had traces of ketamine, revealing Neville was drugged the night of the murder. Joe and Mike then talk to Neville and reveal to him that he might have been drugged but he tells them that he killed Sarah. Henry figures out Neville is covering for someone that he cares about, which is his daughter. Henry and Joe then track Cecilie, but she has a clear alibi as she was working in a restaurant that night. She then tells them that she one day saw a woman dressed like her mom. She then followed the woman to their old apartment, but when she looks her face, she figures out it was just a girl that her father hired for sex. Jo then shows her Sarah's picture to authenticate, but Cecilie tells them Sarah was not the woman she saw. Meanwhile, we see Jennifer wearing that. Taking Iona's class she then asks Iona to talk to her about a situation she is in and they go to her office where Jennifer reveals Sarah told her about Iona and how she helped her so she wants the same too. Iona then notices Jennifer is wearing Sarah's clothes and tells Jennifer to come another time as she has another appointment now. Iona then calls Henry's office and Lucas picks up but before she can tell him anything she gets hit from the back by jennifer to come another time as she has another appointment now iona then calls henry's office and lucas picks up but before she can tell him anything she gets hit from the back by jennifer lucas calls henry and tells him he just got a call from nyu psych department and henry immediately figures out iona is in trouble the two then drive to iona's office and but when jennifer hears henry's voice she stabs iona on the neck joe and henry break into the office at the same time and arrest jennifer thankfully ionis stab was not fatal and she recovers in the hospital henry visits her and the two talk about how much they care about each other but ionis sees henry is not ready so she tells him to call her when he is episode 17 the episode opens with the ceo of halloween corp lawrence getting interviewed on national television we then see eric a member of a hacktivist group called Faceless, hacking into the TV station and playing a recording of Lawrence which reveals his corruption. Two days later Eric is found dead in his apartment. Henry and Lucas rule the death by asphyxiation. They also figure out Eric died of an excess amount of gas in the air. And when Mike looks around, he finds the Faceless mask hidden in the apartment. Irene and Keith from Cybercrime join the team for this special investigation. They sweep through Eric's computer and find out that his thermostat was hacked which released the gas and killed Eric, making the case a murder. Irene and Keith then trace back the IP to its original location while Henry and Joe go back to the apartment and gas themselves to exactly see how Eric died. After waiting for a while, Henry figures out the amount of gas should not have been able to kill eric and he finds a small hand mark on eric's chin suggesting the killer was at the apartment lawrence is then brought into custody by mike after the ip was tracked to his computer but with henry's findings he would not have been the killer because lawrence was at home at that time henry and joe then go to the restaurant eric worked at and they run into his girlfriend liz but she runs away as soon as they try to talk to her and manages to escape them by hacking the traffic lights and driving through traffic with no problem later that day henry gets a message from his lab computer from liz she tells him his credentials and his life was manufactured and threatens to send all the info she has on him to joe she then asks him to get her a death certificate so she can start a new life conflicted on what to do henry home later but he finds Liz in his shop. She is there to get her death certificate but Henry refuses to do that and tears the death certificate in front of her face. She then leaves angry and as she is crossing the road she gets hit by a car. She lands in the hospital in critical condition. Mike and Joe think she was committing suicide but Henry figures out the street light were hacked tricking her to go into traffic and get hit by a car. Keith also confirms his suspicion and reveals the traffic lights were hacked. The hospital is put in lockdown and Henry and Keith go back to the station. Henry then stays to check on Liz and he is joined by Irene. Joe brings in a man named Warlock who created Faceless with Eric and Liz but he reveals to them that the city code was changed recently so he would not have been able to hack the system. Meanwhile, Henry sees Irene acting anxious and he figures out she is the killer. He confronts her and she immediately confesses that she taught she found someone to love but Eric was only being with her to use her and steal the city key to hack the system. When she found out this, she killed Eric in revenge but also because her life would have been ruined if it was found out she gave the key to Ericic liz then goes into shock as she is losing oxygen but when henry goes to help her irene also threatens to expose him to the police he ignores her and calls for help and liz was able to be saved irene then runs outside but ruins into joe and keith she then tells keith it's over and walks into incoming traffic killing herself henry's secret is safe for now and even liz helps him out by hacking the system and tightening up the holes in his story. Episode 17. The episode opens with Rick celebrating a successful treasure hunt. Later we see him alone in the office and he gets attacked by a mysterious person and killed by a harpoon. Henry and Lucas do the autopsy and find out Rick was on the sea recently. They also figure out he was a treasure hunter and that he had recently found gold. Ernie, Joe and Mike then search Rick's garage and Henry is shocked to find out the ship Rick found out was the ship he first died on. We are taken to a flashback when Henry was on that ship. He was on the ship because he just found out his father was involved in the slave trade and he wanted to fix that. But the ship captain wouldn't listen to him so Herney decided to free the slaves. He tells one of them he's going to get them a key to their cage so they could escape but before he could accomplish that mission he was killed by the captain henry always felt guilty about not being able to free the slaves and this ship which should not have been found on the coast of new york is also raising more questions on what happened on that ship the next day eric screw davy margot and chappy are all brought into custody henry joins in the investigation but the only question he asks them is how they found the ship, he only gets an answer from Margot as she tells him Rick had a map, this means someone knew where the ship was but Henry can't figure out who, so he and A break into the garage at night and investigate, but as they search, they run into Rick's old partner George, they then chase him outside and run into Joe and Mike who also came to arrest him, George tells the team that he was cut out of the deal after a diver named Brock died trying to retrieve the treasure. He also reveals to them Rick had gotten financing from a man named Isaac for the mission. Henry and Joe then visit Isaac at a fundraising event. They then see him give a speech and reveal the gold found on the ship. Isaac then promises to give the money to charity. The two then talk to him and he informs them that Rick gave him the gold as that was their deal isaac was the person that paid for the exploration which made him owner of the gold too henry is then called into another room and he finds adam waiting for him adam then gives him the gun he was killed by and disappears as joe comes into the room the next morning joe comes to the office and finds rosa sent by isaac asking her out for a date joe is a little flattered and with mike's encouragement she agrees to go on the date. And that night she goes to his home. The two grab a wine but when he tries to make a move Joe gets nervous and goes to the bathroom to give herself a pep talk. We then see Margo sneak into the home and knock out Isaac but before she kills him Joe comes back from the bathroom and they get into a fight. Meanwhile Henry has just figured out Brock the diver that died had the same condition as Morgan making them siblings which also means she might be the killer and as they enter the home they find Joe apprehending Morgan. Later Henry asks Isaac how he got a map and Isaac tells him a story about a man that died trying to save a slave and as he was getting dragged out a key fell out of his hand which the slaves used to free themselves and take over the ship and then crashed the ship on New York and lived lived as free men for the rest of their lives and isaac is a descendant of those people henry returns home relieved of his guilt he then gets a call from adam who tells him that he believes only the weapon that made them immortal can kill them he then tells him he never had the courage to do it when he had his murder weapon and asks henry to call him if he gets the courage to do it episode 19. the episode opens with joe and is and Isaac on a date. Joe has taken him to watch a rock band. But their date stopped when the bass player accidentally breaks the wall and a dead woman is revealed in it. The woman's body is brought to the lab and Henry tells Joe the women have been mummified. Joe then gets a call from a prison a man named Eddie has called to ask if the woman is Lucy. She then asks him why he wants to know and he tells her because he has been arrested for her murder for 35 years henry and joe visit eddie in prison and they learn the reason he was arrested was because her blood was found on his guitar but he tells joe that he didn't kill her and that she was his true love henry then goes back to examining the body and figures out the murder weapon was not the guitar which gives them the right to reopen the case but joanna tells them eddie is about to sign a plea deal so he can go free. So, Herney rushes to the office and reveals his findings. He tells Eddie if he signs the paper that the case will get closed and he will never find out Lucy's killer. Eddie then refuses to sign and Henry and Joe go back to investigate. They first talk to the band's old photographer, Carl, and he tells them that Eddie and his team members were all drug addicts and violent. He also tells them the other band members also hated Lucy, and he gives them the name Frank, the owner of the club who might have had a motive too. Joe and Henry then inform Joanna about their findings, but she doesn't let Joe investigate Frank as he is getting watched by the FBI for other bigger crimes. She then tells Henry in private he can go as he is not police and get the information he needs. Later that night, Henry Lucas go to the club Frank owns and after multiple tries they manage to get his DNA. Frank is then brought into custody after his DNA was found on money Lucy had. But he tells them that he gave Lucy that money because she wanted to start a new life. Joe then finally decides to talk to the only other living member of the band Paul and he tells them that Eddie and Lucy had a fight that night. And when Paul went to's office later, he found Lucy dead and her blood on Eddie's knife. He then reveals he hit the body because he wanted to protect Eddie. Henry is shocked with the new revelation. He takes the evidence and goes to Eddie but Eddie still claims he didn't do it. Henry then goes back to the lab and he discovers Lucy had been clean for months. He then runs a urine test and reveals that Lucy was pregnant. He and Joe then go to the hospital and they find her son's birth certificate. They then go to the home of his adoptive parents and they find him to be the son of the photographer Carl. Carl immediately confesses and tells them that Lucy came to him when she was pregnant with Eddie's child. He then helped her get clean and gave her an apartment. But once she had the baby she wanted to go back to Eddie. Carl didn't like that and he confronted her in Eddiedie's office he then accidentally killed her by pushing her to the wall and her head get punctured by a nail joe coughs carl but as she takes him outside they find eddie waiting for them with a gun he came there to kill carl but when he hears his voice he drops his gun on the floor in the last scene of the episode hernie shows abe the birth certificate of eddie's son and the paper had the same mark as where abigail sent them a letter from after she disappeared in 1985. Henry have been able to move on after he got no leads for years, but we then follow as Abe opens a storage room and it is revealed to us that Abe have not quoted looking for her. Episode 20. The episode opens with Odessa getting ready for her last ballet performance as Prima. The show starts with her leads, but the next performer Eva is nowhere to be found. Someone then screams from the other side of the room and reveals a severed foot. Henry examines the foot and figures out it was cut off while she was alive but the problem is her body is still missing. The next day when Henry and Joe visit Eva's brother Javier, he informs them that Eva had an anonymous stalker. Meanwhile Abe comes to the lab and asks Lucas to search for a woman that worked in the hospital around 1985. He reveals to him it was his mother and that he didn't tell Henry because he didn't want him to be worried. Lucas then agrees to help and requests the employee report from the hospital. Later Eva's car is found abandoned and after examining the blood inside Henry figures out Eva was still alive in it and that she might still be alive now. They then talk to the ballet director Dimitri and he tells them Odessa was not happy that Eva was going to take her spot as Prima. Mike and Joe then arrested Odessa and her bodyguard Sergi who has recently been paper sprayed by Eva. Sergi tells them he followed Eva to a statue but after that he didn't follow her after that. The team then go to the statue and Henry finds a note from a secret lover telling Eva to come to a motel. They then drive there and find more blood in the room. Henry then follows a tire track and they find Eva unconscious across the street. Eva is immediately brought into the hospital and everyone continues their work until she wakes up. Eva gains consciousness and tells Mike the person she was in a relationship with is Dimitri. Joe then brings in Dimitri but he tells them he was in love with Eva and that they kept their relationship secret because Eva didn't want people to think she only became prima because she slept with the director henry then talks to the doctor and learns that the person that cut off eva's foot never intended to kill her as they surgically cut off the foot without hitting the major arteries he tells the information to mike and joe mike then remembers javier was a military doctor he and joe then go to javier's home but he runs away as soon as he sees them they then chase him to to the roof, but Javier tries to jump off to the next building, but he doesn't make it and he dies. The two then find the Soyuz to cut Eva's foot, but Javier wanting to hurt his sister didn't make sense to Henry. Lucas then returns with the tox report, which reveals Eva had a bone disease that would have stopped her from dancing. This is when Henry realizes what's really happening. Javier cut off Eva's foot because she wanted him to do it. Eva didn't have much time to dance but she wanted to be remembered so she did this to herself to be remembered forever as a great ballerina that got her foot cut off because of jealousy. But the team has no proof so they won't be able to charge her. That night Joe comes to Henry's home after she ditched going to Paris with Isaac, she tells Henry she didn't want to go with Isaac but before she can tell him why, Abe interrupts them and asks to talk to Herney. And as soon as Joe leaves, Abe tells Henry that he found Abigail. Episode 21. The episode opens with Henry reading Abigail's file while she worked in the hospital. They then travel to the place Abigail used to live in. They run into the landlady and she tells them that Abigail disappeared one day and never returned. Henry then looks around and finds Abigail's favorite flower. He then sees something mysterious on the ground and when he digs it, he finds a human skeleton buried. They take the skeleton to the lab and find out that person was murdered, but they figure out the skeleton is a woman in her 20s. They then ID the women to be Belinda, Henry and Joe, then go back to the hospital to find out what happened the night before Abigail disappeared. A nurse working there at that time reveals to them there was a car accident that resulted in the death of a motorist and left a minor injury to Blinda. Henry and Joe then go through Abigail's report and they find Abigail reported that Blinda was a victim of a they then search the name that brought Blinda to the hospital and they find out it is a federal judge named Terry. Henry and Joe confront Terry but he refuses to talk to them but the next day terry comes to the precinct and reveals that he and blinds were drunk driving and they hit the motorist terry then sees the motorist will likely die so he left him there and brought in blended to the hospital he then tells them the reason he left blinda in the hospital was because blended didn't want her boyfriend to see her with terry henry and joe then go back to abigail's home and find a hidden cellar joe then gets gets a call from Mike telling her Blinda's boyfriend was the town's sheriff named Vance. At the same time, Vance comes into the cellar with his gun out at Henry, but before he could shoot him, Joe gets back just in time and stops him. Vance is then brought into custody and confesses to killing Blinda, but he reveals to them that he didn't kill Abigail and that he saw her go away with a man. Henry and Joe then go back to the home and trace Abigail's movement. They then find Slid off-road and Henry finds a crashed car and Abigail's skeleton. Later that night, Henry goes through the report for the motorist, but he doesn't find a death report. He then realizes who the motorist is. Henry, filled with anger, calls Adam and asks him why he killed Abigail. Adam then tells him the full story. That night, Adam was hit by the car and sustained major injuries abigail was the nurse that was taking care of him and she saved his life but he wanted to die to recover fully so he asked her to kill him and reveals to her that he is immortal but for the first time adam met someone that believed him he figures out the only way she believed him is because she knew someone that was immortal too so he came to her home and asked to talk to her in private but as they were driving abigail intentionally drove off the road and crashed the car adam then tried to save her but she then slit her throat and killed herself abigail thought adam wanted to hurt henry so she died to protect him episode 22 the last episode opens with blair opening an old box and finding the dagger adam was killed by and she cuts her hand accidentally with it a day later she is found dead lucas arrives at the scene with joe and mike while henry joins abe for abigail's funeral the Thank you for watching. dagger Adam was killed by, and she cuts her hand accidentally with it. A day later she is found dead. Lucas arrives at the scene with Joe and Mike, while Henry joins Abe for Abigail's funeral. The next day Henry and Joe go to the museum that Blair worked at. Henry then finds the box Blair was working on that night, and finds the imprint of the dagger on the cloth. Henry immediately figures out Adam's dagger and leaves the museum abruptly. He then goes back home and tells Abe of Adam's fury about them only being killed by the weapon that first killed them and tells him that he plans to use the dagger to kill them. The next day Henry and Joe go to the home of Aubrey. He tells them that Blair comes to him whenever she finds an old artifact to learn about them and to authenticate them and reveals to them that the night she died she left in a hurry to meet her fiance. Joe and Mike then bring in Dwayne and he reveals to them that Blair came to him with the dagger, he and his friend Xander wanted to sell it but she wouldn't let them. Xander then left that night to convince her and then called Dwayne later to tell him the dagger is safe. Henry, Joe and Mike then go to Xander's home but they find him tortured and on the brink of death. Joe and Mike then look around the house to see if the killer is still close but Adam comes out of another room and warns Henry to stay away from his dagger and threatens him with a dire consequence. Henry, now scared Adam will kill Joe if she doesn't drop the case, tries to throw the case himself, but Lucas figures out the same person hit Blair and Xander and informs the team. Henry and Joe then go back to the museum, and Henry immediately notices the security guard hit Blair with his baton, but he tells Joe to search another room and he tries to confront the guard himself. This doesn't go well and he gets his ass kicked but Joe saves him. After the investigation of the security guard, Henry figures out he was hired by Aubrey to get him the dagger. He then fakes an emergency and visits Aubrey but he is followed by Joe and she catches him as he gets the dagger from Aubrey. Joe is now very suspicious of Henry and asks him to tell her the truth but he doesn't give her anything so she drops him at home and takes the case away from him but henry returns to the lab immediately after and asks lucas where the dagger is lucas tells him joe has instructed him to not let him touch the dagger but he still gives him risking his own job henry then meets adam and below the train station and gives him the dagger this makes adam angry as he taught henry would try to attack him but Henry just starts going away. Adam then brings out the picture of Henry and Abigail that Abigail had with her when she passed away and starts taunting Henry with it. In that moment, Henry is shot by Adam and falls to the ground and Adam gets close to him and whispers to him either he's going to die in front of Joe or his secret is going to be revealed. Henry then whispers back to Adam and tells him he is not a killer but he is a doctor. He then injects him with a chemical that makes people paralyzed and Adam manages to walk back to the subway before he falls down and he is taken to the hospital. Joe was following Henry through the subway but she lost him. She then hears the gunshot coming from below but when she gets there, she finds only Henry's watch. Abe waits anxiously beside the river, and to his relief, Henry is resurrected. Henry then visits Adam in the hospital to make sure he is truly paralyzed. He then goes back home and they celebrate with Abe. Joe then knocks on his door and gives him his watch. Henry then starts to lie and say he lost it, but before he could finish his excuse, she shows him the picture of him and Abigail. Abe then tells Henry to tell Joe the truth, and the season ends as Henry tells Joe he has a long story.

The next day Henry and Joe go to the home of Aubrey. Joe and Mike then bring in Dwayne and he reveals to them that Blair came to him with the dagger, he and his friend Xander wanted to sell it but she wouldn't let them. Xander then left that night to convince her and then called Dwayne later to tell him the dagger is safe. Henry, Joe and Mike then go to Xander's home but they find him tortured and on the brink of death. Joe and Mike then look around the house to see if the killer is still close but Adam comes out of another room and warns Henry to stay away from his dagger and threatens him with a dire consequence. Henry, now scared Adam will kill Joe if she doesn't drop the case, tries to throw the case himself, but Lucas figures out the same person hit Blair and Xander and informs the team. Henry and Joe then go back to the museum, and Henry immediately notices the security guard hit Blair with his baton, but he tells Joe to search another room and he tries to confront the guard himself.
